Download the AI model to start learning sign language (~2.58 GB). Use Wi-Fi.
Download AI model to learn sign language (~2.58 GB)
Hi! I\'m Ishara 👋\nAsk me anything about Indian Sign Language!
Hi! I\'m Ishara 👋\nDownload the AI model to start chatting.
Please download the AI model first to start chatting.
Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
This will permanently delete this chat and all photos in it. Continue?
This will permanently delete all chats and photos. This cannot be undone.

What is ISL?

ISL stands for Indian Sign Language.

It is a language used by deaf and hard-of-hearing people in India. Instead of speaking with your voice, you use your hands, face, and body to talk.

Just like Hindi, Bengali, or English — ISL is a real language with its own words and grammar. Millions of people in India use it every day.


Why is ISL important?

Many deaf children cannot hear spoken words. ISL gives them a way to talk, learn, and share their feelings.

• It helps deaf children communicate with family and friends.
• It helps parents understand what their child needs.
• It builds confidence and independence.
• It connects deaf people with a welcoming community.

Learning even a few signs can make a big difference!


ISL Grammar Basics

ISL grammar is different from English or Hindi. Here is the main rule:

ISL uses SOV order — Subject, Object, Verb.

Examples:
• English: "I eat food" → ISL: "I food eat"
• English: "She drinks water" → ISL: "She water drink"
• English: "What is your name?" → ISL: "Your name what?"

Don't worry! Ishara automatically converts your sentences into the correct ISL order. Just type normally and we handle the rest.


Tips for parents

Dear parents, here are some simple tips:

Learn together — Practice signs with your child every day, even just 5 minutes.

Use signs at home — Sign while talking ("eat", "water", "sleep"). It helps your child connect words with signs.

Be patient — Learning a new language takes time. Celebrate small wins!

Use this app together — Let your child watch the sign videos and try copying them.

Don't give up — Your effort to learn ISL shows your child they are loved and understood.

How to use Ishara

Using Ishara is very easy! Here is how:

1. Type your question in the chat box at the bottom.
 Example: "How do I say hello in sign language?"

2. Ishara will reply with the answer and show you the sign.

3. Tap on any sign video to watch and learn the gesture.

4. You can also use your voice — tap the microphone button and speak.

5. Use the camera to take a photo of any object — Ishara will tell you how to sign it!

That's it! Just ask, watch, and learn.

About Ishara

Ishara (ইশারা) is a Bengali word meaning "sign" or "gesture".

This app was created to help deaf and hard-of-hearing people learn and use Indian Sign Language (ISL) with the help of AI — completely offline, right on your phone.


Your privacy is safe

Ishara cares about your privacy.

Everything happens on your phone — no data is sent to the internet.

We do not collect your voice, photos, or chats.

The app works fully offline — no Wi-Fi or mobile data needed after the AI model is downloaded.

Your conversations are private and stay only on your device. Always.
